title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・先を行く者よ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross wins the autumn Tenno Sho with a
spectacular performance that has everyone in the
stands on their feet.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One is also swept up in the excitement and
swears to catch up with her one day.
